name: huffman

key_functions.lzhuf_tree_init: Adaptive Huffman decoder: init tree, DMA streaming, bit I/O
key_functions.lzhuf_tree_rebuild: NON_EQUIVALENT — tree rebuild on frequency overflow

evidence.cross_references: lzss.c (all Huffman functions called from LZSS decompressor)

summary: Adaptive Huffman tree decoder (FGK algorithm) with double-buffered DMA streaming from ROM. Provides bit-level I/O (read 1/8/n bits), byte-level I/O via DMA refill, Huffman tree init/rebuild/update for adaptive decoding. Used by LZSS decompressor in lzss.c.

functions.name: lzhuf_dma_refill
functions.summary: DMA refill: switches active buffer (ping-pong between sDecompBufs[0]↔[1]), waits for PI completion via osRecvMesg, then starts async DMA for next compressed chunk.

functions.name: lzhuf_read_byte
functions.summary: Read next byte from active DMA buffer. If buffer exhausted (sDecompBufPos >= sDecompChunkSize), calls lzhuf_dma_refill and resets position.

functions.name: lzhuf_read_bit
functions.summary: Read 1 bit from bit buffer. If fewer than 9 bits remain, reads a byte via lzhuf_read_byte and shifts into buffer.

functions.name: lzhuf_read_byte_bits
functions.summary: Read 8 bits (1 byte) from bit buffer. Same refill logic as lzhuf_read_bit.

functions.name: lzhuf_read_bits
functions.summary: Read n bits from bit buffer (up to 16). Uses sBitShift[n] (shift = 16-n) and sBitMask[n] (mask = (1<<n)-1).

functions.name: lzhuf_tree_init
functions.summary: Initialize Huffman tree: set all leaf frequencies to 1, build initial tree ordering with internal nodes = sum of children. Sets sBitCount=sBitBuf=0.

functions.name: lzhuf_tree_rebuild
functions.summary: Rebuild tree when root frequency reaches MAX_FREQ (0x8000). Halves all frequencies (freq+1)/2, re-sorts frequency table, rebuilds tree links. NON_EQUIVALENT.

functions.name: lzhuf_tree_update
functions.summary: Update adaptive Huffman tree after decoding a symbol: increments frequency of the decoded node, reorders if frequency ordering is disturbed (swap + update parent/child links), walks up to root.

macros.R: 626 = T - 1 — root position in Huffman table

globals.sDistBase: 256×u8 — LZSS distance base value table (maps code to offset base)
globals.sDistExtra: 256×u8 — LZSS distance extra bits table (maps code to additional bits)
globals.sBitBuf: u16 — bit buffer for streaming bit I/O
globals.sBitCount: u8 — remaining valid bits in sBitBuf
globals.sBitMask[17]: Mask table: 0,1,3,...,0xFFFF. @bug element 15 is 0xFFF should be 0x7FFF
globals.sDecompBufs[2]: Double DMA buffer pointers (shared with lzss.c)
globals.sDecompReadPtr: Active read pointer in DMA buffer (shared)
globals.sDecompWritePtr: Output write pointer (shared, set by lzss_start)
globals.sDecompRemain: Remaining bytes to decompress (shared, set by lzss_start)
globals.sDecompLastFlag: Flag: 1 when last chunk loaded (no more DMA needed)
globals.sSlideWindow[4160]: LZSS sliding window buffer N+extra (shared, N=4096)
globals.sHufFreq[628]: Huffman frequency table (one per tree node)
globals.sHufMap[628]: Huffman node-to-frequency index mapping (shared with lzss.c)

open_questions: lzhuf_tree_rebuild is NON_EQUIVALENT — the asm doesn't match the C code. Needs further analysis.
@bug in sBitMask[15]: should be 0x7FFF, is 0xFFF. Doesn't affect anything (x_cc1d0de5 never = 15).
sHufPad[4] in BSS: declared but never referenced — dead padding?
